free_text: The elastic scattering of protons by 6Li in the
The target was made by vacuum evaporation of 99.3%
enriched 6Li metal on a 1000 Angstr, nickel foil.
The thickness of the target was equivalent to
30 keV energy loss for 1.3 MeV protons.
gave only relative values of the cross-section. The
absolute scale has been evaluated by reciprocity
of the inverse reaction obtained by Tombrello and etc.
